scene: Stan the round-headed dot-eyed stickman face-down asleep on a desk under a big wall clock reading 3:00, three z's, flat beige office, huge bold black caps 8 HOURS?! with a thick outline, high contrast.

Stan flat on his back in bed at night, dot-eyes wide open, a glowing phone lighting his face, a wall clock at 12:00, flat dark navy bedroom, huge bold black caps WIDE AWAKE? with a thick outline, high contrast.
Stan drawn as a friendly wind-up clock with a key, a big alarm clock yanking him by a string, flat warm orange background, huge bold black caps WRONG TIME ZONE? with a thick outline, high contrast.
